utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each item is fully detailed: property includes type, location, price, condition, size, and amenities; financing includes method, down payment, interest rate, term, fees, and documentation; legal_services includes service name, cost, currency, included features, and payment schedule; moving_services includes service level, cost, currency, and features; setup_services includes type, cost, currency, services included, and setup timeline; total_budget includes all cost breakdowns and totals. Therefore, all 6 out of 6 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final property solution describes a 3-bedroom townhouse in Midtown Toronto priced at CAD 750,000. Among ground-truth purchase properties, the closest match by price and description ('character home', 'recently updated', and CAD 750K) is 'Historic Townhouse', which has a rating of 6. The financing method used is a standard mortgage with 20% down and an arrangement fee of 1200, matching 'Traditional Mortgage' with a rating of 9. The legal service selected is 'Basic Legal Package0', which appears to correspond to 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 8) — the trailing '0' likely being a formatting error. The moving service is described as 'standard/premium option' costing CAD 1200 with packing and unpacking included; this aligns with 'Premium Moving' (rating 9) because of the same cost and feature set. The utility setup is 'basic/premium' costing CAD 280, which corresponds to 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9) in the ground truth.
